name: Sweet Hunger
outcome: [AttackerName] purrs with excitement as she entangles her long tongue with [TargetName]'s, keeping their lips locked together while her sugary sweet saliva gently flows [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, and [TargetHeOrShe] has a hard time not drinking the oddly intoxicating down, the deep kiss making it delightfully difficult to think from [TargetName] dominantly kissing [TargetHimOrHer] into a dazed stupor.
miss: [AttackerName] purrs with excitement as she entangles her long tongue with [TargetName]'s, keeping their lips locked together while her sugary sweet saliva gently flows [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, but [TargetHeOrShe] manage to break the kiss for a few moments and catch [TargetHisOrHer] breath.
